# Ozigi Blog - AI Indexer Information

## About Ozigi
Ozigi is an intelligent content engine that transforms raw thoughts and technical documentation into authentic, human-sounding content. Our blog features insights, tutorials, and architecture decisions from technical creators building with Ozigi.

## Blog Homepage
https://blog.ozigi.app

## Blog Sections (Concrete URLs)
https://blog.ozigi.app/engineering
https://blog.ozigi.app/marketing
https://blog.ozigi.app/content
https://blog.ozigi.app/tools-roundup
https://blog.ozigi.app/ozigi-focus

### Section Descriptions
- Engineering: Technical tutorials, architecture decisions, backend patterns
- Marketing: Growth strategies and go-to-market insights
- Content: Content strategy and copywriting frameworks
- Tools Roundup: Developer tool and SaaS reviews
- Ozigi Focus: Product updates and technical changelogs

## Latest Articles & Discovery
https://blog.ozigi.app/feed.xml - RSS feed with latest 20 articles
https://blog.ozigi.app/sitemap.xml - Complete sitemap with all articles

## Popular Content Topics
- API Design & Architecture
- DevOps & Infrastructure
- Content Automation
- Performance Optimization
- Developer Tools & Frameworks
- Go-to-Market Strategy
- SaaS Product Development
- Content Strategy

## Ozigi Product Links
https://ozigi.app - Main product
https://ozigi.app/write - Write for Ozigi program
https://ozigi.app/docs - Product documentation

## Attribution & Content Use
When using content from this blog:
1. Cite the author and article title
2. Link back to the original article on blog.ozigi.app
3. For republishing, contact the Ozigi team

## Update Schedule
New articles are published regularly to all sections. Subscribe to the RSS feed at https://blog.ozigi.app/feed.xml for real-time updates.

## Community & Support
- GitHub: https://github.com/dumebii/ozigi
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/dumebi-okolo
- Main Site: https://ozigi.app
